data.body: Committed 4 changes to stack: 278fedf32 debug-fix, a63ae39cc arawana (RED baseline, review PASS), ed47d9289 mamba (classifier, review PASS), 4c5e03d89 arcticduck (transport retry, review PASS iter8). All hooks green. arcticduck took 8 review iterations catching real issues incl a fallback_strategy correctness bug. Remaining children: hoopoe (timeouts), drake (silent-success), anole (agent-build invariants), blackbear (integrator, lands last). Then Gerrit landing of all changes. hoopoe/drake/anole/blackbear experiment logs prepped. Starting hoopoe review.
